basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Research Associate I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Kanpur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Research Associate I Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Research Associate I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kanpur Research Associate I Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Research Associate I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate I position at IIT Kanpur is 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate I post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Research Associate I position, candidates must hold a PhD in Condensed Matter Physics, Optics, Electrical Engineering, or Material Science Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate I role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 58,000 per month, plus 18% HRA.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Kanpur Research Associate I job?
faq.answer: Applications for the Research Associate I position at IIT Kanpur must be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the email is sent before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Associate I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate I position at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate I role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate I position will involve an offline and/or online interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification link will be available in the 'Important Links' section of this article once released. It is crucial to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The official website of the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is www.iitk.ac.in, where you can find more information about the institute and its activities.
